spawnRegistry.description: Tracks parent-child pattern lineage. When a parent pattern sheds a sub-signal into a new pattern, both are recorded here.

spawns.reason: GitHub artifact sharing sub-signal matured into independent socialization pattern
Customer-facing enablement layer distinct from eval schema/framework scaffolding
Signal-to-synthesis-to-artifact loop distinct from routing/dedup decisions
Eval-specific scoping questions separated from general platform Q&A
Loop/PPT pipeline sub-workflow matured into standalone pattern

resurrectionRegistry.description: Tracks patterns that returned from archived state with fresh signal evidence.

resurrections.triggerSignal: Daily Personal Day-Prep Planning Page freq=5
resurrections.reason: PM resumed structured daily planning artifact practice after 13 cycles dormant

resurrections.triggerSignal: Weekly Solution Library Check-In meeting signal
resurrections.reason: Recurring Monday meeting restored after absence, indicates operational rhythm resumed

candidateSkills.name: eval-design-advisor
candidateSkills.description: Codifies eval expert knowledge for scoping, edge-case guidance, tooling mechanics, CLI troubleshooting, and design patterns. BSI 89 CRITICAL approaching emergency 90 threshold — PM sole DRI for 10+ request types including CSV import/export quirks, feature flags, CLI tooling, tool_call_accuracy, golden eval design. RISING with 13-15/cycle sustained. Unblocks expert scaling bottleneck.
triggerExamples: How many evals should I create for a 3-intent Copilot Studio agent?
What is the difference between keyword match and semantic eval grading?
Guide eval design for actionability assessment framework
Help troubleshoot CSV import/export and tool_call_accuracy flags in eval CLI
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Unblocks BSI 89 CRITICAL bottleneck (approaching 90 emergency). 226 occ. 10+ request types codifiable. PM sole DRI for 22+ unbroken cycles. Est. ~$133,484/yr.

candidateSkills.name: eval-report-synthesizer
candidateSkills.description: Ingests eval results, strategy discussions, and EvalCon planning threads. Produces standardized reports with gap analysis. RISING. 434 occurrences, 5 participants. Highest value score (95). EvalCon deadline approaching.
triggerExamples: Synthesize eval progress from CAPE leadership threads and EvalCon submissions
Generate eval strategy analysis from Project Crucible evals-first deepdive
Prepare Golden Evals kickoff report from meeting transcript
Create EvalCon content planning summary from Teams discussions
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves ~108.72 hrs across 5 roles. Highest value (95). RISING + EvalCon deadline amplified. Est. ~$282,672/yr.

candidateSkills.name: meeting-notes-action-extractor
candidateSkills.description: Ingests meeting transcript, agenda, or Loop doc and emits structured action items with owner/due-date, decisions log, follow-up email draft. Chain head for transcript-to-loop and post-meeting-external-followup downstream. 339 occ across 21 unbroken cycles. Loop structure confirmed: Agenda → Notes → Decisions → Follow-ups.
triggerExamples: Extract action items from today's Camp AIR standup and update the Loop doc
Summarize external customer meeting into Loop page with owners
Create standardized 1:1 notes template for all recurring meetings
Generate post-meeting recap from CAPE Architecture Call transcript
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Replaces ~61.37 hrs across 4 roles. 339 occ over 21 cycles. Chain head for 2 downstream patterns. Est. ~$159,562/yr.

candidateSkills.name: ado-notification-router
candidateSkills.description: Classifies ADO notification emails by work-item type (Task, Requirement, Bug, Feature, Epic), workstream prefix, and urgency. Routes action-required to correct role; auto-archives FYI. DEEP SATURATION at 863 occ. Highest automation score (95). Decomposition overdue 17 cycles.
triggerExamples: Triage my ADO inbox — what needs action vs FYI?
Classify ADO notifications by workstream: IcM vs coverage vs AI Eval
Which Bug/Requirement notifications require PM response before EOD?
Route this Task notification to the correct DRI based on workstream prefix
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Eliminates ~31.09 hrs. 863 occ SATURATED at 30/week. Highest automation (95). Est. ~$80,834/yr.

candidateSkills.name: calendar-triage-advisor
candidateSkills.description: Advises on meeting conflicts, priority triage, and weekly time budget with WCI detection. 671 occ, 428 hrs. MPBI 14. WCI 67 CRITICAL this cycle (Camp AIR 900min = 42% of weekly budget). 50+ external domains, 13+ external hours. RISING.
triggerExamples: What meetings should I decline this week to protect focus time?
Show me my workload concentration — what dominates my calendar?
Triage external meeting requests across 50+ partner domains
How much of my week is consumed by immersion events vs recurring syncs?
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves ~428 hrs. 671 occ. MPBI 14 (highest ever). WCI 67 CRITICAL. Est. ~$1,112,800/yr.
